title: $modelname
text: $modelname Return the value of the Model property (the suffix of the entity name) of the specified entity $modelname { ( EntityName ) } Example: vReturn=$modelname(CUSTOMER) Return Values Name of the model of the specified entity (in uppercase). Empty string ( "" ), if there is no current entity (that is, if the last node of the active path is not a field or entity), or the current entity has no Model value. Use Allowed in all component types. Description The $modelname function is useful when you are writing global ProcScript functions, because it allows you to generalize your code. It is also useful to examine this function when you are using the Debugger to step through ProcScript statements. You can use $modelname from everywhere within the component. Example: Returning the Fully Qualified Name of the Current Field The following ProcScript example returns the full qualified name of the current field: function FullQualifiedFieldName returns string return $concat("$fieldname",".",$entname,".",$modelname) end Copy Was this topic helpful?
